name: Suman Shrestha
about_bio_1: Experienced and innovative software engineer with over {{years}}+ years in the software development industry.
about_bio_2: Specializing in requirements gathering, development, debugging, troubleshooting, testing, and deployment.
about_bio_3: Skilled in creating detailed, intuitive, robust, and scalable web applications within cross-functional teams.
about_bio_4: Proven track record in problem identification and analysis, consistently meeting deadlines.
contact_message: Always available for freelancing if the right project comes along. Feel free to reach out through any of these.
work_intro: Selected work below — the full story behind each professional role lives on the Experience page.
project_description: This site — a Next.js portfolio built around a code-editor-inspired design: a syntax-highlighted hero, a JSON-styled About page, and a terminal-styled Experience timeline, all on a custom SCSS design system.
work_callout_before: Looking for professional experience instead? See my work at IONOS, Bosch Rexroth, Zepling IT, and OLE Nepal on the
exp_0_task_1: Designed and built frontend pages using TYPO3 Mask templates for multiple IONOS-owned brands, including United Domains, World4You, and Fasthosts.
exp_0_task_2: Adapted layouts and components to match each brand's distinct design system while keeping the underlying TYPO3 templates reusable across brands.
exp_0_task_3: Worked as a fullstack developer on an in-house marketing campaign platform, building the frontend with React and TypeScript.
exp_0_task_4: Developed and maintained Java Spring Boot microservices powering the backend of the marketing campaign platform.
exp_0_task_5: Integrated the React/TypeScript frontend with Spring Boot microservice APIs, working across both the TYPO3 brand sites and the microservices-based internal tool.
exp_1_task_1: Developed reusable Angular components and upgraded the Angular version from 12 to 18 for improved performance and maintainability.
exp_1_task_2: Created and managed monitoring dashboards using Prometheus and Grafana to track system performance and reliability.
exp_1_task_3: Optimized queries in MongoDB to enhance database performance and efficiency.
exp_1_task_4: Implemented IoT solutions using MQTT to transmit data from devices to Azure Event Grid, and subsequently to a device portal for extensive data storage.
exp_1_task_5: Utilized Docker to containerize applications, improving deployment efficiency and scalability.
exp_2_task_1: Created modern, single-page web applications in JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Next.js, Vue.js, and Redux that incorporated responsive web design and frontend technology.
exp_2_task_2: Developed and implemented REST APIs using Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, and MySQL, powering a high-performance web application; slashed response time by 40% and handled 10x more concurrent users.
exp_2_task_3: Optimized website performance by an average of 60%, reduced page load time by 40% and improved user interfaces (UI) and user experiences (UX).
exp_2_task_4: Coded reusable components to reduce code duplication and maintain code quality.
exp_2_task_5: Led the entire software development lifecycle encompassing requirements gathering, design, coding, testing, and deployment, facilitating on-time and within-budget project completion.
exp_2_task_6: Ensured continuous integration and deployment (CI/CD) processes using Git, GitLab and GitHub.
exp_2_task_7: Conducted comprehensive unit and integration testing, ensuring software quality and adherence to industry best practices; identified and resolved critical bugs, reducing production issues by 40%.
exp_3_task_1: Collaborated with designers to transform wireframes, prototypes, and modern UI/UX into responsive web applications using web technologies like HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, and Figma.
exp_3_task_2: Engineered robust RESTful APIs utilizing Node.js, Express.js, and MongoDB for seamless integration with a web application; optimized database queries resulting in a 50% reduction in API response time.
exp_3_task_3: Improved website loading time by 20%, increased website visits by 15%, and implemented a system to allow for consistent design and branding across all websites.
exp_3_task_4: Coordinated with QA teams to conduct manual testing of web applications, identifying, and resolving bugs, performance issues, and usability problems.
impressum_heading_responsible: Responsible for content according to § 55 (2) RStV
impressum_disclaimer_text: The content of this private portfolio website has been created with the utmost care. However, no guarantee can be given for the accuracy, completeness, and topicality of the content.
